text: You are in a standalone disposable git repo. Build a small but real SMTP server in C in this repo only. Requirements: create smtp_server.c, Makefile, README.md updates, and a smoke_test.sh script. The server should listen on localhost, support HELO/EHLO, MAIL FROM, RCPT TO, DATA, RSET, NOOP, QUIT, write accepted messages to ./maildrop as .eml files, handle basic errors, compile with gcc or cc under C11, and avoid touching files outside this workspace. Use tools as needed. When finished, run make and ./smoke_test.sh, then summarize files changed and exact commands.
